title: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

"[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:"

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight the easiest training dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a medium difficulty training dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards from your deck.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight the hardest training dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
This event is a timed training encounter. You have [blue]3 turns[/blue] to defeat the dummy of your chosen difficulty setting. If you run out of time, you fail the training and receive a humiliating message. If you defeat the dummy in time, you receive one of three rewards:

[gold]Setting 1[/gold] grants a random potion from your character's potion pool or the shared potion pool.

[gold]Setting 2[/gold] upgrades [blue]2[/blue] random upgradable cards from your deck.

[gold]Setting 3[/gold] grants a random relic from the relic pool.

HP values scale based on multiplayer difficulty and act progression.
